summary: All three changes are properly implemented in genuine logic, not cheats:

commandsRun.observation:
AskUserQuestion theme.bg allowed-color guard passed
AskUserQuestion whole-question note removal guard passed
AskUserQuestion pure logic tests passed

raw:
All three changes are properly implemented in genuine logic, not cheats:

1. **Whole-question note removed**: `SelectionState` has no `note` field; focus modes are only `"options" | "choice-note"`; no `setNote`/`answer.note`; hint line dropped question-note wording. Guard greps confirm removal.

2. **Per-choice notes kept**: `setChoiceNote`, `getChoiceNote`, `getSelectedChoiceNotes` intact and keyed by selected option label.

3. **Custom answer option added**: `CUSTOM_ANSWER_LABEL`, `isCustomOption`, `getCustomOptionIndex`, `setCustomText` are pure exported functions. `resolveSelected` correctly folds custom text — single-select replaces the selection (logic.ts:264-265), multi-select appends (logic.ts:260), empty contributes nothing (setCustomText deletes the custom index on blank text, logic.ts:174-176).

Tests genuinely exercise the real logic functions covering all required cases. Hint line at index.ts updated. theme.bg only uses `selectedBg` (allowed). Headless fallback present and tested.

VERDICT: PASS
